description: Melody appears to provide a hosted GraphQL service reachable at `api.melody.sh`. Publicly discoverable material for the domain is limited, with a playground or API page referenced at `melody.sh/play/`.
summary: melody.sh exposes a known GraphQL endpoint at `https://api.melody.sh/graphql`; public docs are indicated at `/play/`, but authentication requirements could not be confirmed from the available public pages.
